name: Bug report
about: Something is broken or behaving incorrectly

## Context

<!-- Which file(s) or area is affected? What did you observe? Why is it a problem? -->

## Action

<!-- What specifically needs to be done to fix it? -->

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] The described behaviour no longer occurs
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
